name: Invivyd, Inc.
business: Invivyd, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing monoclonal antibodies for the prevention and treatment of infectious diseases, with its only authorized product being PEMGARDA, a monoclonal antibody for pre-exposure prophylaxis of COVID-19 in certain immunocompromised patients. The company also develops product candidates such as VYD2311 for COVID-19 and VBY329, as well as preclinical programs in RSV and measles.
sellsTo: healthcare providers for pre-exposure prophylaxis of COVID-19

exposures.sentence: We will remain highly dependent on the commercial success of our only authorized product, PEMGARDA, for the foreseeable future, until VYD2311 or any other product candidate is authorized or approved and successfully commercialized, if ever.
advance our preclinical and discovery programs, such as RSV and measles, including development and screening of additional antibodies
advance our preclinical and discovery programs, such as RSV and measles, including development and screening of additional antibodies

catalysts.event: PEMGARDA received Emergency Use Authorization from FDA for pre-exposure prophylaxis of COVID-19
catalysts.sentence: PEMGARDA, which received an EUA from the FDA in March 2024 for pre-exposure prophylaxis of COVID-19 in certain immunocompromised patients.
In January 2024, we nominated VYD2311, a mAb optimized for neutralization potency against SARS-CoV-2 lineages such as BA.2.86 and JN.1, as a drug candidate.

catalysts.event: FDA declined EUA amendment request for PEMGARDA to cover treatment
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, the FDA declined our EUA amendment request.

catalysts.event: FDA cleared IND for VYD2311 and provided feedback to advance REVOLUTION clinical program
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced that the FDA cleared our IND application for VYD2311 and provided feedback to advance our REVOLUTION clinical program, which is our development program for VYD2311 comprising two clinical trials, DECLARATION and LIBERTY.

catalysts.event: Initiation of DECLARATION clinical trial for VYD2311
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we initiated DECLARATION, and in February 2026, we announced alignment with the FDA on LIBERTY, each as further described in Part I, Item 1 Business of this Annual Report on Form 10-K.

catalysts.event: Alignment with FDA on LIBERTY clinical trial for VYD2311
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we initiated DECLARATION, and in February 2026, we announced alignment with the FDA on LIBERTY, each as further described in Part I, Item 1 Business of this Annual Report on Form 10-K.
